0.q: Subcellular membrane proteomes reveal that SbiSOS1, a homolog of the well-known SALT-OVERLY-SENSITIVE 1 (SOS1) protein, appears to localize to the tonoplast... This neo-localized protein can pump Na+ into the vacuole, preventing toxicity in the cytosol.

1.q: the proline contents in the plants overexpressing the SbPIP1 gene were significantly (P < 0.01) higher than those in the WT plants after 3 days of stress treatment

2.q: the proline contents in the plants overexpressing the SbPIP1 gene were significantly (P < 0.01) higher than those in the WT plants after 3 days of stress treatment
